title: Hei dagger & mask
description: dagger and mask from anime Darker than black
body:
3D resourse pack which changing textures of vanila swords and carved pumpkin.

Versions prior to 1.21.5 require optifine or CIT resevn.

Rename any vanilla sword on anvil to "U-dagger", carved pumpkin - "mask", "broken mask" and enjoy playing with this pack.
